officialSources.title: Unlimited plan is switching to Max

runway/gen-4.5.description: World's best video model. Supports text-to-video, image-to-video, and keyframe animation. Delivers state-of-the-art quality and coherence.
runway/gen-4.5.notes: Cost: 12 credits per second of video. Available on all paid plans. Introduced December 2025.

runway/gen-4.description: Flagship video generation model. Creates fast, controllable, and flexible video generation that can seamlessly sit beside live action, animated, and VFX content.
runway/gen-4.notes: Cost: 12 credits per second. Supports 5 or 10 second durations. Requires an input image. Available on all paid plans.

runway/gen-4-turbo.description: High-speed version of Gen-4 optimized for rapid iteration. Delivers faster generation times at a lower cost.
runway/gen-4-turbo.notes: Cost: 5 credits per second. Supports 5 or 10 second durations. Recommended for initial testing and iteration. Available on all paid plans.

runway/gen-4-image.description: Most advanced base model for image generation, offering stylistic control and visual fidelity. Formerly known as Frames.
runway/gen-4-image.notes: Cost: 8 credits per 1080p image, 5 credits per 720p image. Supports image references for consistent characters and scenes. Available on all plans.

runway/gen-4-image-turbo.description: High-speed version of Gen-4 Image for rapid image generation.
runway/gen-4-image-turbo.notes: Cost: 2 credits per image, any resolution. Available on paid plans.

runway/seedance-2.0.description: Advanced video generation and editing model. Use text, image, video, or audio to generate or edit videos.
runway/seedance-2.0.notes: Cost: 36-40 credits per second (varies by resolution). Available on Unlimited/Enterprise plans (outside US).

runway/aleph-2.0.description: Video editing model in Edit Studio. Edit a frame the way you want, and Aleph 2.0 edits the rest of your video to match.
runway/aleph-2.0.notes: Cost: 28 credits per second (56 credit minimum). Available on paid plans.

runway/act-one.description: Performance-driven character animation model. Creates expressive character performances from video input.
runway/act-one.notes: Available on Pro and above. Works with Gen-3 Alpha and Turbo.

runway/nano-banana-2.description: Most advanced and consistent image generation and editing model.
runway/nano-banana-2.notes: Available on paid plans. Introduced February 2026.

runway/gen-3-alpha.description: Production video generation model. Precursor to Gen-4.
runway/gen-3-alpha.notes: Legacy model. Superseded by Gen-4 and Gen-4.5 for most use cases.

runway/gen-3-alpha-turbo.notes: Legacy model. Cost: 5 credits per second (API).

video-generation.description: Generate videos from text, images, or keyframes using Gen-4.5, Gen-4, Seedance 2.0, and third-party models.

image-generation.description: Generate images using Gen-4 Image, Nano Banana 2, and third-party models.

image-editing.description: Edit images using Aleph, Nano Banana 2, and other tools.

video-editing.description: Edit videos using Edit Studio, Aleph 2.0, and other tools.

frames.description: Image generation for cinematic stills (now part of Gen-4 Image).

motion-brush.description: Animate specific areas of an image.

camera-controls.description: Control camera movement in generated videos.

lip-sync.description: Sync audio to character lip movements. Custom voices available on Pro.

erase-replace.description: Erase objects and replace with AI-generated content.

expand-video.description: Expand video canvas beyond original frame.

inpainting.description: Fill in missing parts of images or videos.

upscaling.description: Upscale images and videos to 4K resolution.

audio-tools.description: Text-to-Speech, Sound Effects, and Speech-to-Speech audio generation.

api.description: Programmatic access to Runway models with credit-based pricing.

studio.description: Timeline-based video editing: trim, stitch, reorder, and export final videos.

runway-agent.description: AI creative partner to develop and produce finished videos through conversation.

characters.description: Real-time intelligent avatars you can talk with and learn from.

workflows.description: Custom node-based workflows chaining together multiple models and modalities.

plans.notes: 125 one-time credits. Includes Gen-4 Turbo (Image to Video), Gen-4 Image (Text to Image, References), Gemini 3 Pro, Gemini 2.5, Image Apps, Generative Audio, Text to Speech, Audio Apps. 3 video editor projects, 5GB asset storage.

625 credits/month = 52s of Gen-4.5, 104s of Gen-4 Turbo, or 78 Gen-4 Images (1080p). No watermarks. 4K upscaling. Access to all AI images and video models (Gen-4.5, Nano Banana Pro, Aleph, Veo 3.1, and more). Annual billing: $12/month (save $36/year).

2250 credits/month = 187s of Gen-4.5, 375s of Gen-4 Turbo, or 281 Gen-4 Images (1080p). Create Custom Voices for Lip Sync and Text to Speech. 500GB asset storage. Access to best models (Gen-4.5, Seedance 2.0, Kling 3.0, Nano Banana Pro, and more). Annual billing: $28/month (save $84/year).

Replaces Unlimited plan as of June 1, 2026. 9500 credits/month = 791s of Gen-4.5, 1900s of Gen-4 Turbo, or 1187 Gen-4 Images (1080p). Roll over unused credits for 1 month. First access to newest models. Highest generation volume. Annual billing: $76/month (save $228/year). Existing Unlimited subscribers automatically move to Max on September 1, 2026 at the same price.

Custom enterprise pricing with custom credit packages, SSO, workspace analytics, configurable teamspaces, enterprise-wide onboarding, priority support, and custom team sizes. Contact sales for details.

Usage-based credit pricing. Credits purchased at $0.01 per credit. Minimum payment of $10 to get started. Model costs vary: gen4.5 (12 credits/sec), gen4_turbo (5 credits/sec), gen4_image (5-8 credits/image), gen4_image_turbo (2 credits/image), aleph2 (28 credits/sec), seedance2 (36-150 credits/sec).

models.notes: 5 credits per 720p image, 8 credits per 1080p image.
28 credits per second (56 credit minimum per generation).
36-40 credits per second (varies by resolution). 150 credits/sec for 4K.

creditSystem.description: API usage is metered in credits. Credits can be purchased at $0.01 per credit. Minimum payment of $10 to get started.

thirdPartyModels.description: API access to select third-party models including Veo 3.1, Gemini Image 3 Pro, GPT Image 2, and ElevenLabs audio models. Pricing varies by model.

apiPricing.notes: All API pricing is in credits. 1 credit = $0.01 USD. Credit costs vary by model, duration, quality, and resolution. Sales tax may apply depending on location.

notes: Runway operates a credit-based subscription model. Free plan includes 125 one-time credits. Standard ($15/mo): 625 credits. Pro ($35/mo): 2250 credits. Max ($95/mo): 9500 credits. Enterprise: custom. The Unlimited plan is being phased out and replaced by Max as of June 1, 2026, with existing subscribers automatically moved on September 1, 2026. Gen-4.5 is the latest flagship video model. Gen-4 Image (formerly Frames) is the flagship image model. API credits purchased at $0.01/credit with a $10 minimum.
